Huge crowd of sales people (both men and women), not customers, can be seen chatting, laughing, gossiping what not.. They will go to any extent to sell a product, half of their  claims are untrue.  Unfortunately this is the way business is run in India and Vasanth n Co is no exception. No responsible person to answer queries and no ownership for any of our requests.  Till buying you are the king and once you make payment, you are at their mercy.  No one will take responsibility for delivery or installation. Everyday, they will say tomorrow we will close for sure and that tomorrow comes after a week. That too after your continous follow-up and literally begging them.  People to be cautious and clear in what you need and what is Vasanth n Cos deliverables once you buy.  Else you will end up like me, for sure.  Do proper homework of the rates of the item that you plan to buy.  Else they will quote a price, make a scene of giving you the best discount and the final price will be higher than the market price.

review_text: We bought a wet grinder from adyar branch 3 weeks back. When we opened the box at home found guarantee card and instructions manual were missing. We tried running the grinder, whole grinder along with rollers started to run in circles. We called the customer care. While talking itself they got irritated. I asked for problem report Id. We were informed we will receive sms. Which we didnt receive. We tried premier customer care. They informed us we received a broken roller. Really didnt expect this from Vasanth and co as we are regular customer. We bought a wet grinder from mylapore branch. It didnt give any problem for 15 years. Same with AC and TV. Customer care didnt even hear us. Constantly said technician will be sent. I was trying to explain there is some fault in roller or some part is missing. Also broken part was neatly covered and taped. Everyone tried to convince us to use the broken grinder which was fixed. When we pay the whole amount, why we should use the repaired grinder? Finally through a contact in Premier team we got our grinder replaced. If we dont have contacts we would have end up using the broken grinder as there is no or same response without any results. Please dont deliver broken appliances. Kindly do quality check before delivery. We made a mistake by not checking in the store. It cost us more time. Customer care response needs to be improved as we got same response with no results. Definitely wont go to adyar branch in future. Mylapore branch was so friendly. But its closed now.

Shocking surprise - 1 Initially everything went well and I decided to go with Bajaj finserv EMI option to finish my purchase. I went on to Bajaj finserv counter and asked him to create new account for my need. Once completed all online formalities he surprisingly demanding 750/- rupees to get the new Bajaj card. I was shocked. He would have told me earlier when he started off all formalities. When I questioning about his approach, he simply told me that I would aware of their (own) formalities. How do I know about their company formalities without telling that to customers. Am I astrologist or kind of fortune teller? After that, he told me that as a Bajaj new card holder, I am having privilege of 1.5% of cash back offer in front of everyone including sales person. I somewhat convinced myself and approached to cash counter to pay the amount of Rs. 16,000/-. Shocking surprise - 2 Here I faced second surprise. My instinct told me something. I was about to confirm that they will deliver the product without charges. Surprisingly again they defending about the delivery formalities. They told me that I need to pay nearly Rs.300 for delivery as I am residing at Thiruvanmiyur. They should have told to the customer upfront about these things or at-least if they have common sense, need to provide free delivery service. I thing they should learn from online store competitors I guess they are not completely outdated. Once I completed the card swiping formalities and all, I asked about the cash back offer. They (Bill counter guy and sales person) told me that I will be getting the cash back offer amount by another person who is going to delivery the product at home. Shocking surprise - 3 Ok. All set to go. I got my product delivery on-time (!) next day. When I asked about the cash back offer to the product delivery guy, he was staring at me like a kinder-garden kid. I made a phone call to the showroom and they simply (with very cool tone) explained me that I have only 1% (But they told me 1.5% at the time of purchase) of cash back amount and need to come Adyar Showroom to get my cash back (Just Rs. 160/-) money offer. Vasanth & Co billing counter guy and Bajaj finserv guy, both of them completely denying that they werent accepted to provide 1.5% of cash back offer. Is this really professionalism? When I stress them about their fault, tone of those guys are not good towards me. Simply I could say this one... Please dont try to purchase your dream product at Vasanth & Co. They will sucks your peace of mind. They wont keep their promise. This is my bad experience with Adyar - Vasanth & Co showroom. Here is my update now, as on 26 October 2017 One person came to my home from Vasanth & Co head office on next day after I raised this complaint in various portal.  He asked me about what was happened during the time of purchase. I explained to him all details. Finally he requested apologies about what was happening to me and handover my cashback (1%) amount as in person. Good one. I really appreciated their quick turn around and best of luck for their successful business.

review_text: We were regular customers of Vasanth and Co., especially this branch.  But the latest experience with this branch, had actually become a nightmare, causing health issues to my father, who is 73 years old. We ordered a fridge during a festival time and delivery was promised within 3 days. But instead of delivering the fridge, they either avoided our calls or gave false information, regarding the time of delivery. Atlast fridge was delivered after 12 days, which resulted in nervous breakdown of my old father. The reason for this inordinate delay is very simple. They have changed the old system of stocking goods in respective branches, to centralized stocking in a godown in Vadapalani. (This is what I was told in the branch for the delay) So no one in any branch in Chennai, will have any idea whether the stock is available at present in the Godown or not. So they attempt to dodge the customers. I share my experience not to hurt anyone. But only to warn others about delay in delivery, which may cause serious issues to some people like my father. The administration can rectify their errors, if what I was told in the branch about centralized delivery system, is true. But the damage caused, can never be reversed.

review_text: Ordered a Voltas window AC from N Usman Rd branch on March 29th and after 7 days it is still not delivered. On April 3rd, they tell that theres no stock. Wonder how an unavailable item can be invoiced? Maybe to show March end sales. Nobody bothered to call and update customer on status. After going to shop and shouting, they check and inform that it will be delivered on Apr 5th by 2 PM but have not done so yet. Their salesperson was extremely rude and non responsive who seemed to care only about sales numbers rather than customer service. AC was booked 4 wks back and paid fully on March 29th and they claim that they erroneously double booked the same item. Now running pillar to post at their store. Pathetic customer service. Update April 5th 2021, 7 PM: AC finally delivered after several follow ups but due to delay it can be installed on April 7th only even though it was promised that installation will be done today itself. In the meantime, we are living in our home with a big hole in the wall for the last 7 days facing safety concerns, especially with a toddler at home, and will continue to do so for another 2 days because the old AC that was exchanged was promptly taken away by theyre contractor within a day of the order. Update April 7th 2021: AC finally installed and the installation fellow also fleeces you for wood pieces (500 Rs for 2 blocks of scap wood) in addition to the installation charges. Advise to all future buyers: Do not agree for delayed deliveries. They started by saying itll take 2 days after payment. Insist for same day or next day delivery and get it confirmed that they have stock (on their computer not just verbal). Do not trust sales persons in the shop on anything and Ask for documents wherever possible.

review_text: Our nightmares with this particular chain of stores and branches started when we first decided to lock in here to purchase a new refrigerator. For patrons coming from afar in a car, they don t offer valet parking nor do they help in parking the car in an appropriate public spot. After parking the car, we were browsing through the different brands they had, and the salesman who assisted us initially was fairly good at what he was doing. Here s where the second stage of the nightmare started when another minion of an assistant named Vishwa, came in and hijacked the deal from the first salesman. Vishwa wasn t particularly nifty in his work. Upon being posted with a question on a spec or pricing for a particular brand/ model, he always needed  1 second  to get them answers from his colleagues. Anyways, the refrigerator at home had breathed its last after 20 years of quality, and we needed to make the purchase for installation as soon as possible. We were ready to make the full payment on the same day, without any financing options, as we needed it ASAP. We were initially looking for the Whirlpool brand, which costed 25k, and gradually changed our mind to a robust model in Panasonic which costed around 30k. Vishwa told us that the Panasonic would be delivered on the same day, whereas the Whirlpool model could be delivered only on the day after. However, when we thoroughly investigated a particular model in Liebherr, it was decided that we would be buying that model, even if it overshot our budget by at-least 25%. It was the  perfect one  and we were okay with buying it even if it would be delivered only on the day after. From the moment we fixed our model, Vishwa started pushing this in full force, where he promised that the product would be delivered the NEXT DAY, and the installation would happen on the DAY AFTER DELIVERY. The above promise and the subsequent promises from Vishwa were complete rubbish. First, he offered a discount of a net 1500, where they would give us a stabilizer and a stand for the refrigerator. Also here, the stand could be delivered only after 2 days, and Vishwa told us 3 times that he would personally come and deliver it at our home. The refrigerator was delivered after multiple follow ups on the same day, but way beyond the evening time they promised. The installation was supposed to happen the following day. On the day of the expected installation, after waiting the whole day, we received no response, and our calls were getting ignored. However, when dialled from a neighbour s number, Vishwa immediately picked up the call and that s when Vishwa informed us that THEY (Vasanth and Co) WON T PERFORM THE INSTALLATION as VISHWA QUOTED EARLIER, but the technician from Liebherr would perform the installation, and all they d do is the raising of customer support tickets to Liebherr to perform the installation. The third day after delivery our patience was tested as our food products were getting spoilt, flowers getting faded etc. We had a conversation with a spokesperson from Liebherr, when they to our shock, told us that THEY WON T PERFORM INSTALLATION FOR THIS PARTICULAR MODEL, much in contrast to what Vishwa had promised. They were grateful enough to accept the mistake made by the dealer (Vasanth and Co), and helped us with the installation by sending their technician on the same day. We had conference calls with the dealer, and Vishwa himself along with Liebherr to understand why this wasn t communicated earlier. Now, the stand which was promised on the 2nd day of purchase, was not delivered until today. We seldom expected Vishwa to personally come and deliver it as he promised above, but we at least expected them to deliver it and help us place the refrigerator on the stand. I WOULD PROFUSELY ADVICE AGAINST VISITING THIS STORE OR ATLEAST THIS PARTICULAR BRANCH. IF YOU HAVE NO OTHER CHOICE THAN THIS PARTICULAR BRANCH, AVOID VISHWA DEALING YOUR SALES AT ALL COSTS.

Totally Dissatisfied: Beware of Vasanth & Co Ulagaram branch and Samsung Fridge: I booked Fridge there which costs 28k. I got delivered the same day which make me feel good for fastest delivery. Next day itself Samsung executive came at my door step for installation.  He started explaining about the specifications. Before purchasing the item, i read the model catalogue, reviews and specifications clearly later only i booked the item.  At the time of demonstration, the freezer door was opened. Later only i realize door alarm unit is not working. I asked about the  issue to samsung executive, he told the alarm unit is not comes in this model. I showed the user manual to him and said alarm system is mentioned in manual. He said that alarm unit will not comes in 272 litres model. I googled the model and shows the specification to him. He still rejects and says it will not come only LED display option is available. Then, i showed user reviews, then he asked me to wait and he called one of his senior executive through this phone. After cuts the call he still says that alarm unit is not come this model. I felt upset and called samsung customer service centre and told  the model number. Service centre executive confirms the alarm unit function is active in this model. I asked him to hold a call   for a minute and asked him to say the same  to the installation executive. After that he agreed and said alarm unit is not working it seems  like that. Before leaving my home, he said that he will inform the same to showroom and replace the fridge as soon as possible. After that i saw my fridge all the four side and saw the bent in bottom side. I expected a call from showroom and  waited so long. But, i didnt get any call from showroom. After two days i made a call to the installation executive and asked for the replacement. He said i already informed the showroom and you will get a call from them soon like that. But, i didnt receive any call. Again i made a call to samsung customer service centre and asked  the solution for this issue . They  said sunday is holiday for them and asked me to wait till monday.  The executive came on monday at my doorstep and checked the fridge. After that he removed the panel and checked.  Then  he said alarm unit is working and ask us to check. After that we check the same door alarm unit works. I was happy after that and thought the problem was solved.  Again from the next day, it stops working. I am regretted for purchasing the samsung fridge and vasanth & Co. Because, till now i didnt receive any call from them. Totally dissatisfied.
